configurations.name: janthony-proposal
runtimeArgs: const h=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const d='C:/Users/natha/OneDrive/Abel Lumber/Sales Pipeline/Custom Builder Push April 2026/Homes by J. Anthony';h.createServer((q,r)=>{let f=path.join(d,q.url==='/'?'Interactive_HTML.html':q.url);fs.readFile(f,(e,b)=>{if(e){r.writeHead(404);r.end('Not found');}else{r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':'text/html'});r.end(b);}});}).listen(7843,()=>console.log('OK'));
